description: Style Note You can see the smooth blend of style and comfort in this remanika creation. This printed top can be worn to beat the heat in style with a pair of shorts and flip flops.Product Details Off white top with a graphic print in front, has capped sleeves and a round necklineMaterial and Care Cotton Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron  Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
